text.message: I meant to get a good compliment
red wants that settle on the 4 ore
he is close already its scary
it's bad real estate up north
He will find out the hard way haha
it's a greedy push i didnt expect it
i really want to delay that as much as posible
The point of the game is to be greedy I don’t get it Oj lol
man i didnt expect that either haha fair play
red i have the plow here
i think i just have to take it
The plow had little value other than slowing me
but the settle was also odd no?
why no go for port first?
The point is Oj I retailiate out of principle
u really dont like me ay?
red set up strong as well
it's catan no one is every leading
We know u obsessed w my setup
he only stole from me lol
i got stolen so much already
It hasn’t even been me who claimed he would retailiate haha
But yeah that is th plan
Sty blue give me first trade
now i will roll a 7 knowing my luck
I have two and one wood
if red connects we can save the game
well you got no knights that's for sure
no i just want to have the 4 blocked i dont need it
since i have the other 4 too
i ve heard than one before
red block the 3 grain if you can
U know Oj has no knights
U don’t know that about me
if u had a knight you would just tel
But u can’t trust the opps
Smart I would have done eight
